name: CAL-51 Google Sheets Validate Dedupe and Claim Dry Run

parameters.jsCode: const m=$input.first().json.data||[]; const h=m[0]||[]; const rows=m.slice(1).filter(r=>r.some(v=>v!=='')); const col=n=>h.indexOf(n); const keys=rows.map(r=>r[col('dedupe_key')]); const duplicate_count=keys.length-new Set(keys).size; const formula_risk_count=rows.flat().filter(v=>typeof v==='string'&&/^[=+\-@]/.test(v)).length; const eligible=rows.filter(r=>r[col('publish_ok')]==='OK'&&r[col('review_status')]==='approved'&&r[col('status')]==='approved'&&r[col('reviewed_by')]&& !r[col('claimed_at')]&&!r[col('render_id')]&&!r[col('publish_id')]); return [{json:{header_count:h.length,row_count:rows.length,duplicate_count,formula_risk_count,eligible_claim_count:eligible.length,claim_action:'dry_run_no_update'}}];
